text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Takarazuka Kinen. Fine Motion
hopes that her run today will leave a deep
impression on everyone's hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is struggling with her thoughts, so I
tell her that she can just continue as she has been,
considering it's her joyous running that her fans
have come to love.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes my words to heart and heads off to the
race, practically praying that people will
remember her.
